data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of full audit columns for tracking changes, specifically who made changes and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any audit trail or logs that document these changes, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of such critical information directly leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of audit columns for tracking changes, specifically who changed what and when.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
